title: We don’t need more proof that flexibility works. We need more people using it.
snippet: "Flexibility works. The real bottleneck is scaling participation fast enough to matter."
ai_summary: Article discusses demand flexibility as a proven mechanism but notes the real challenge is scaling participant numbers. Relevant to tem's flex/trading business as it identifies market adoption barriers.
ai_reasoning: General industry trend piece on flexibility scaling—directly relevant to tem's flex offering but no tem mention, no specific market event, and no actionable intelligence this week. Background reading to understand market narrative around flexibility participation.
